note: Fixed benchmark set for the validation protocol. Adding or removing inputs requires a versioned contract update. Placebo series are generated deterministically from the corresponding real input using the specified rule.

inputs.description: FRED economic indicators, monthly, 1986-2025 (n≈480). Primary canonical real-data test.
Belgian COVID epidemic data from ECDC, daily (n≈350). Known to produce INDETERMINATE on stable split due to near-constant C.
Belgian excess mortality from OWID (n≈4500). Large daily series.
Ecological PELT dataset. Reference for decidability — stable_n_decidable should exceed 6.

stable.description: First 50% of rows (PRE_FRAC=0.50). Must give NOT_DETECTED on a well-specified detector.

placebo.description: Cyclic shift by N//3 rows. Preserves autocorrelation, breaks temporal alignment. Must give NOT_DETECTED.

evaluation_rule: All inputs in the benchmark set are evaluated. Results are aggregated per-input, not cherry-picked. Any future input addition must update this contract version.
